title: Trump says Justices Barrett, Gorsuch ‘sicken me’ after Supreme Court tariff ruling
summary_full: The Supreme Court, in a 6-3 ruling, said President Trump did not have authority under the International Emergency Economic Powers Act to impose tariffs.
summary_public: The Supreme Court, in a 6-3 ruling, said President Trump did not have authority under the International Emergency Economic Powers Act to impose tariffs.
